title: Methyst
description: The texture pack replaces all amethyst with Methyst.
body:
![Methyst](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEdges/Modrinth/main/logomet.png)
## Description

**Methyst** - texture pack replaces all amethyst with crystals from the Breaking Bad -
Amethyst block, amethyst shard, amethyst cluster-bud, amethyst buds, calibrated sculk sensor and most importantly amethyst material on armor.
